newsitems.title: Beta Hotfix Notes - v0.105.1
newsitems.author: demileaf
newsitems.contents:
Quick hotfix today addressing several bugs.

[h3]USER INTERFACE & EXPERIENCE:[/h3]
- Updated the [b]Aeonglass[/b] boss icon

[h3]BUG FIXES:[/h3]
[b]Enemies:[/b]
- Fixed [b]Aeonglass[/b] first move intent showing a buff instead of a debuff

newsitems.title: Rejoice, Doormaker haters: Mega Crit removed him
Beta Patch Notes - v0.105.0
newsitems.author: demileaf
newsitems.contents:
[h2]CONTENT & BALANCE:[/h2]
[b]Silent:[/b]
[list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Blade of Ink[/b] card: damage decreased from +2 -> +1
[/list]
[b]Defect:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]Hyperbeam[/b]: damage increased from 26(34) -> 28(36)
[/list]
[h2]BUG FIXES:[/h2]
[b]Enemies:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed [b]Kaiser Crab[/b] appearing if you load into an already completed boss room
[/list]
